headline: The Hartford Names Natalie Burns Head Of Enterprise Sales And Distribution
summary: HARTFORD, Conn., April 09, 2026--The Hartford has appointed Natalie Burns head of Enterprise Sales & Distribution, reporting to Tracey Ant, head of Middle & Large Business, effective May 1. In this role, she will be responsible for enhancing relationships with The Hartford’s top distribution partners and working with the company’s Personal and Business Insurance, as well as Employee Benefits sales teams to drive growth across business segments.
